programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a missing tax inspector is found floating in the cider vat at Midsomer Abbas spring fair, just as Barnaby and Jones are sampling the local cider.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: After a nun is strangled, Barnaby and Jones investigate the world of Midsomer Priory.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At the meeting of the ornithological society, Ralph Ford claims that he had spotted the blue-fronted hoopoe, but no one believes him, including the chairman, Patrick Morgan; the next morning, Patrick is found dead, leading the team to investigate.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the appearance of a headless horseman foreshadows a number of deaths.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Grady Felton's return to the village is met with anger from the locals; when a barrister is killed, he becomes a suspect; he is targeted in an arson attack.

programme.title: The Colony
programme.desc: An astronaut shipwrecked on a long-decimated Earth must decide the fate of the wasteland's remaining populace.

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes
programme.desc: A team of investigators is torn apart when one of their teenage daughters is brutally murdered.

programme.title: The Marsh King's Daughter
programme.desc: A woman returns to the wilds of her youth to face her father, who kept her and her mother captive for years.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: An ex-boxer turned enforcer has his loyalties tested when his employers order him to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by an elite task force official to aid in the escalating war against drugs

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Gerry [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Friends Gerry (Casey Affleck) and Gerry (Matt Damon) hike into Death Valley, but they stray so far from the trail that they have no idea how to get back. Initially, they maintain morale by rehashing old stories and reciting inside jokes, but the gravity of their situation sinks in as a return to civilization becomes more unlikely. As the sheer scope, hypnotic pull and spirit-crushing mirages of the desert affect the men, their will to live and sense of identity is challenged and transformed.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Bay City, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

programme.title: Brotherhood Of The Wolf
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province.

programme.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that sends them, their father and one brother's wife barreling towards a shattering climax.

programme.title: Wind
programme.desc: In 1983, yacht sailor Will Parker leads an American crew to defeat during the America's Cup race against an Australian crew. Determined to get the prize back, Will plan involves an experimental boat designed by his ex-girlfriend Kate's new beau. When the boat is completed, the Americans head to Australia to reclaim the cup.

programme.title: Finding Graceland
programme.desc: An eccentric drifter claiming to be Elvis catches a ride with a grieving widower.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: No Small Affair
programme.desc: A teenager falls for an "older woman" and wages an all-out campaign to boost her career and win her heart. Edited for TV

programme.title: Ten Cents A Dance
programme.desc: A taxi dancer tries to protect her impoverished husband from being jailed for embezzling money from his wealthy boss.

programme.title: Gidget Grows Up
programme.desc: Gidget invades the U.N. as a tour guide after her boyfriend, now in the Air Force, goes off without calling her. After many hectic schemes to help world peace and many twists and turns, Gidget's love life is settled.

programme.title: The Doctor Takes A Wife
programme.desc: A publicity stunt links a fiercely independent writer in matrimony with a chauvinistic medical school professor.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome uses her powers of seduction in an effort to convince King Herod to spare the life of John the Baptist.

programme.title: Middle Of The Night
programme.desc: March played a 53-year old widowed clothing manufacturer who happens to fall in love with one of his employees, 30 years his junior. As the romance blossoms and March experiences happiness for the first time in years, his family resents the intrusion of the young newcomer and they do their best to end the romance.

programme.title: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: A brave unicorn and a magician fight an evil king who is obsessed with attempting to capture the world's unicorns.

programme.title: LUV
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Quadrophenia
programme.desc: Fueled by amphetamines and teen angst, Jimmy speeds around London on his scooter with his Mod friends getting into trouble.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: Kurt must learn the ancient kick boxing art of Muay Thai in order to avenge his brother.

programme.title: Northmen: A Viking Saga
programme.desc: A crew of Viking raiders must cut through harsh, unknown territory to reach the safety of a Viking stronghold.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members wake up on an abandoned spacecraft with no idea who they are, and discover they're not alone.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: John's daughter was murdered, so he escapes hell to rescue his granddaughter, with an FBI agent on his heels.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As human blood becomes more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success on dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when his former protégé seeks revenge against all those who have wronged him.

programme.title: Hansan: Rising Dragon
programme.desc: In 1592, Korea faces the threat of the powerful Japanese navy. As defending Adm. Yi Sun-sin's forces fall into crisis, they resort to a secret weapon: the dragon-headed ships known as geobukseon. Using them, they hope to turn the tide of the war.

programme.title: The Mob
programme.desc: The clash between the rising Longde Chamber of Commerce and the entrenched Tongmingtang occurs as old and new orders collide. Fierce family feuds erupt, igniting intense battles on the Shanghai Bund.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success on dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when his former protégé seeks revenge against all those who have wronged him.

programme.title: Devil On Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: An ex-convict moves into his daughter's dorm, and enthralls her friends.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Includes exclusive never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee.

programme.title: Surviving My Father: The Rachel Jeffs Story
programme.desc: Rachel's journey from victim to victor, showing the triumph of the human spirit.

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: The story of Dr. MacNeill brings home a new live-in "nanny" who is his mistress.

programme.title: Devil On Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: An ex-convict moves into his daughter's dorm, and enthralls her friends.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Pete and DeeDee have an announcement for the Gamma brothers. Across campus, Sarah struggles with her new living situation.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: At the Gamma Christmas Mixer, Sarah is missing and her friends' search leads to a shocking attack.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Love's Fast Lane
programme.desc: Nikki, a mechanic, falls for publicist Jeremy as they aim to make her the first female car show host.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
programme.desc: Jimmie & his best friend Mont try to reclaim the home built by Jimmie's grandfather, launching them on a poignant odyssey that connects them to their past, even as it tests their friendship & sense of belonging in the place they call home.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: The Calling
programme.desc: Tamar has been called to become a minister, and for most, this would be an honorable moment, but for Tamar, it is the worst thing that could happen. Tamar is the daughter of prominent Deacon Jessup, and is a lesbian. Taught that her desires are not that of God, Tamar has suppressed them for the last 16 years and has never dated a woman. When the Future Minister’s Ministry opens for a new class, Tamar finds herself falling for the only other woman in the class.

programme.title: The Foreign Exchange Student
programme.desc: Sinclair John is a beautiful, troubled, young high school senior from Dominica. When her parents suspect she may have had something to do with her boyfriends death, they ship her to America under the Foreign Exchange Student Program. While living with her new family, she wreaks havoc and it's up to Jackie to stop her.

programme.title: The Foreign Exchange Student 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Mr. & Mrs. Nelson are excited to be getting two new foreign exchange students to live with them. All of a sudden a chain of murders start to happen again in the city of Houston. Is it connected to Sinclair's death? Who's bringing terror back?

programme.title: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: After the death of her son, Sharease Smalls loses everything, and is forced to move back in with her sister Elise. Struggling to find steady work, Sharease agrees to become a live-in housekeeper for a local crime boss, Zues. The pairs professional relationship soon turns intimate, but it’s only a veil of secrets and lies. Will Sharease survive the truth?

programme.title: Atlantic Rim
programme.desc: When giant monsters crawl out of the Atlantic, the U.S. government turns to A.I. robots to defend the country.

programme.title: Zoombies 2
programme.desc: A game ranger and poachers forge an uneasy alliance as they work together to stop zombie beasts in the jungle.

programme.title: King of the Ants
programme.desc: Hired to murder a stranger, a drifter finds his calling as he leaves a trail of bodies in his wake.

programme.title: Top Gunner
programme.desc: Recent graduates at a secluded Air Force base must protect a bioweapon from the Russian military.

programme.title: Monster Island
programme.desc: Gigantic monsters threaten to destroy everything in their path as mankind remains defenseless.

programme.title: Grand Duel
programme.desc: After their powerful father is brutally murdered, the Saxon Brothers hire a group of bounty hunters to bring suspected killer Philipp Wermeer to justice. But when grizzled Sheriff Clayton saves the fugitive Philipp's life, the two set out to confront the Saxons and reveal the shocking truth about who really killed The Patriarch.

programme.title: Bird With the Crystal Plumage (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An American expatriate in Rome witnesses an attempted murder that is connected to an ongoing killing spree in the city, and despite himself and his girlfriend being targeted by the killer, he conducts his own investigation.

programme.title: #Manhole
programme.desc: On the day before Shunsuke Kawamura's wedding, his colleagues hold a surprise party for him. On his way home from the party, Shunsuke falls into a deep manhole. When he wakes, trapped and horrified by incidents one after another, he gets desperate to escape and uses his only reliable tool, his smartphone. The clock ticks mercilessly and the morning is nearing. Can the groom get out of the hole intact and get married to continue with his successful life?

programme.title: Basket Case 2
programme.desc: Duane and his basket-bound mutant brother are taken in by a secret home for wayward freaks with journalists hot on their tail.

programme.title: Basket Case 3
programme.desc: Duane recovers from his delusional breakdown to find his freakish basket-bound brother Belial will soon become a father. But not everything is joyous as the once tight knit brothers no longer seem to trust each other.

programme.title: Scare Me
programme.desc: Scare Me

programme.title: The Amusement Park
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman goes to the amusement park, only to find himself in the middle of a hellish nightmare.

programme.title: Glorious
programme.desc: A heartbroken man finds himself trapped in a bathroom with a strange voice who says he may be the only hope in stopping a terrible event. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: Sequence Break
programme.desc: An reclusive video arcade technician's reality is fractured when a mysterious new game appears in his shopm causing strange metaphysical forces and bizarre biochemical mutations.

programme.title: Jakob's Wife
programme.desc: After an encounter with "The Master," Anne discovers bite marks on her neck, a new sense of power and an appetite to live bolder than ever. As the body count grows, Anne is increasingly torn between her enticing new existence and her life before.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark arae stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Day 2 of the European Poker Tour Main Event continues, with PSPC champion Ramon Colillas, the USA's Rania Nasreddine and Canada's Griffin Benger among the players hoping to survive the session and stay in contention for the title, trophy and €1.5m top prize.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: They're on the bubble in the European Poker Tour Main Event. The next six players to be eliminated will leave with nothing. The rest will be guaranteed a slice of the €9.5m prize pool. Can YouTube star Wolfgang Poker and Canadian pro Griffin Benger make it into the money?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: At the European Poker Tour's 20th anniversary celebrations, there's a throwback vibe in the Main Event. A player calling himself 'The Eliminator' is holding court at the feature table. Expect banter and bluffs, as this old school character competes for the €1.5m first prize.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Survival is the name of the game, with just over 100 players remaining in the European Poker Tour Main Event. Most of the €9.5m prize pool is still up for grabs, and reigning champ Simon Wiciak and Monte-Carlo finalist Rania Nasreddine can both make EPT history.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: There's €1.5m for the winner of this special anniversary edition of the European Poker Tour. As Day 4 of the Main Event continues, the USA's Rania Nasreddine is put through the wringer and a new generation of poker talent starts to make its mark.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Only 40 players remain in the European Poker Tour Main Event, including reigning champion Simon Wiciak. Can the French pro go back-to-back? The competition is tough: chip leader Stephen Song and Monte-Carlo finalist Rania Nasreddine are also eyeing the €1.5m top prize.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: In the late stages of this European Poker Tour Main Event, mistakes are starting to creep in. But there's no margin for error, with millions still on the line. Among the final 23 are American pro Stephen Song and former EPT finalist Rania Nasreddine.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: All eyes are on the USA's Rania Nasreddine, as she tries to make back-to-back European Poker Tour final tables. Brazilian pro Fabiano Kovalski is another previous EPT finalist looking for a second chance at victory. The top prize in this tournament is €1.5m.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for the Valentine's Day week finale, making a romantic pasta dish that inspires Michael to quote an Italian chef who calls the vigorous mixing of pasta 'the sound of love.' The hosts celebrate food as the ultimate love language and toast to the week with warmth, humor, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly arrives furious after producer Nick bans his gorgeous Ted Baker sweater due to moirÈ camera interference, and the ensuing sweater feud becomes the running gag of the episode as Chewed Up enters an Anything Goes week with no cooking theme and maximum creative freedom. Michael and Carla enjoy Clinton's frustration immensely.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Jackie Bakula, beloved as Sparkles to Chewed Up fans, returns to the kitchen as a guest host while Carla Hall is away filming the Today Show, bringing her warm, professional energy and joining Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly for a celebratory cooking episode full of affection for the show.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Korean-American chef Esther Choi joins for Meat Optional Week, making Kimchi Fried Rice that converts even committed carnivores, while Clinton Kelly prepares his beloved home-alone tofu dish and the hosts celebrate the surprising depth and satisfaction of meatless cooking.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave turns a solo episode into a shabu-shabu meal with our pal Chris Ying. They talk about the beauty of dishes like shabu-shabu, whether they like fish balls, and how Dave makes a delicious sauce for the dish. The duo then talks about Dave's recent trip to San Francisco, Chef Corey Lee and his restaurants, and both the admiration and ire Corey causes in Dave... for being so dang good.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Today, Dave lives más. Dave is joined by Brett Pluskalowski, senior manager of food innovation at Taco Bell. Dave creates a new dish that he hopes will one day make it to the Taco Bell menu, while the duo talks about how Taco Bell innovates, what makes a dish resonate, and how to scale a new recipe to thousands of restaurants. Dave finishes by answering an Ask Dave about music.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a great party dish, japchae, for a party person, Courtney McBroom, co-author with Brie Larson of the new cookbook Party People. programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: Rice, the bread and butter of the Korean table is explored from Busan, Korea’s second largest city, all the way to Seoul. Along the way, Marja and her dear friend, the actress Heather Graham, learn about instant rice, tteok (a pasta-like ingredient made of ground rice) and visit Bibigo, a new chain of contemporary restaurants serving fresh variations of bibimbap.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: Living into one of the most amazing Korean traditions, Jean-Georges visits with the haenyos of Jeju Island, true mermaids who free-dive for seafood off the rocky coast. Jean-Georges feasts on fresher-than-fresh sea urchin, a dream breakfast for a world-renowned chef. Then he enjoys a fortifying seafood stew at Baekrok Haegwon restaurant.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: The variety of bean-based dishes in Korean cuisine is a testament to Korea’s ingenuity and resourcefulness. On The Bean Chronicles, Marja travels to Chodang to see artisinal tofu get made the old-fashioned way with fresh soybeans and ocean water and then enjoys a four course tofu meal with fresh tofu, each preparation completely distinct and delicious enough to convince any tofu nay-sayer.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: A peninsula surrounded on three sides by water, Korea is just about heaven for fish lovers. Marja visits Sokcho, where most of her Korean family resides, to visit Dapeo port early in the morning to see the gigantic octopus come ashore and later eats a memorable meal of simply grilled shellfish in a seaside restaurant.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Meat in the Minor Key
programme.desc: See how meat can be a part of a low-fat diet with Beef in Red Wine Stew, Steak and Pilaf and London Broil.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Rice and Cheese Crusts
programme.desc: Chewy and cheesy, Graham shows how to use this irresistible low-fat crust in a hearty potato quiche and savory seafood pie.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Brown Onion Sauce
programme.desc: Rich with caramelized onions, herbs and red wine, this low-fat sauce is especially great with holiday turkey and is a great leftover dish.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Stocks
programme.desc: Graham shows how easy it is to make these basic and flavor-rich liquids for the basis of innumerable low-fat sauces, soups and casseroles.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Risotto
programme.desc: All the creamy comfort of the classic rice dish with a quarter of the calories, Graham shows how to make both savory veal and a vegetable risotto.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Roast Gravies
programme.desc: Rich, comforting sauces without the fat and calories, Graham features a Mimimax Roast Chicken and Roast Lamb with potatoes and vegetables.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Today's show is a special celebration of Julie's favorite season, Spring! This refreshing time of year puts a smile on Julie's face focusing her cooking on springtime offerings. What better way for Julie to cook, create and celebrate this sensational season than with her crown roasted leg of lamb infused with a bouquet of fresh herbs, slowly roasted, makes the centerpiece on the springtime table!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie makes her Mezze magical in a stunning and scrumptious presentation of her Lebanese cultures most famous small plates perfectly plated for her loving Lebanese family to savor! Mezze, internationally known all over the world as one of the most distinctive and delicious display of dishes to discover originating from Lebanon and Middle East. Julie Taboulie's Mezze makes entertaining enchanting.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie serves up her street food star supreme sandwich, Shawarma. Succulent, spicy, saucy, shaved off a rotisserie spit, Shawarm is one of Lebanon's most famous street-food stars! Julie shares her special tips, tricks and techniques on how-to make her signature street food star, Shawarma, right at home so you can simply re-create her recipes in your very own kitchen and NO rotisserie spit needed.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: An extraordinary eggplant extravaganza Lebanese-style! Julie shares some of her favorite most famous Lebanese eggplant recipes freshly sourced straight from Mama's Glorious Garden. From simple and sophisticated to earthy and exotic, eggplants are excellent selections for sauces, spreads, soups, stews, stuffed and even pickled eggplant too.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The family room is one of the busiest in a home, so Chelsea wants to update hers for her family and her guests. The kids need storage space for their toys, but Chelsea wants to keep it out of sight so we’re creating built in shelving and cabinets to conceal them.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When a first-time homeowner takes on a kitchen renovation and realizes she’s bitten off a little more than she can chew… Danny and Chelsea come alongside to help her tackle some flooring fixes, cabinet modifications and backsplash installation.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: People have lots of reasons to upgrade their garages. Most want more organized storage and a cleaner, more attractive space. These homeowners want all of those things, but they also need a suitable home for a fast and shiny member of the family

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When you work from home, sometimes you have to be really creative about where and how you set up your office. These homeowners had to carve a corner out of the Master Closet so we’re helping the make it both a better closet and a better office.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part one we remove some dated cabinetry, dated lighting and the dreaded pop-corn ceiling before we lay out a new lighting plan and refinish the cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part two we install a great new backsplash, add a cool coating to the counters and finalize the installation of the new lighting.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We're helping a retired homeowner re-kindle her love for the arts by converting her storage shed into an art studio. Once we clean-up the floor plan, add some cabinets and climate control… the space is ready to inspire it’s owner to create and enjoy it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 1 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 2 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. . The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When the house at the end of the cul-de-sac hasn't changed in 28 years, it's time for some front porch rehab! The owners love the house they raised their children in, but they want to update the look of the front porch and the overgrown landscaping that surrounds it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A family with a tiny patio and a huge back yard gets some help from Danny and the crew to make use of their space. Adding a second patio of large format pavers starts the process, while some modifications to family’s storage shed and the addition of a fire pit wrap it up.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your friends and family always enter your house through the laundry room, it better be a great one. Danny, Chelsea, and the crew rally to give this house a clean entrance complete with a cool new butcher block counter-top and an overflow pantry for the nearby kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a couple update a family room that looks smaller than it actually is. We’re removing part of a built-in cabinet system that overwhelms the room and adding some character to a fireplace wall to move it from “forgettable” to “focal.”

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny, Chelsea and the Today’s Homeowner team help a couple extend their living space to the outside with a patio transformation. After some clean-up and repair to an existing brick patio, they add a pergola and shade sail to enhance the space.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny and Chelsea help a couple, who both work from home, create better separation between work and home life. Building a wall and adding a door to separate the home office area from the Master Bedroom is just the beginning of this project to make both work and rest more productive.

programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Top 50 Nursery Rhymes Collection - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the Top 50 nursery rhymes by Kids TV. Babies will learn preschool songs with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Little Red Car - Your Choice Songs
programme.desc: These catchy little songs and rhymes by Little Red Car are fun and entertaining for everyone!

programme.title: Loco Nuts - Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Enjoy the best cartoon show for kids, watch the funny Loco Nuts characters as they have fun & play in the most popular videos for toddlers. Laugh along to these funny videos for children which teach friendship, teamwork & much more.

programme.title: Woofees Funny Cartoon Show & Kids Videos
programme.desc: Enjoy the best cartoon videos for kids, watch the Woofees as they have fun and play in the most popular and funny cartoons for toddlers. Children will laugh along to these animated cartoon shows whose uniqueness lies in the balance of chaos, teamwork, silliness and friendship, all in a fun and light-hearted manner.

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: Observing people is the theme of the day.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: The Raloo Rockers want to go to Dublin to audition for Uncle Buck’s Variety Express.

programme.desc: Piggley’s father tells him an old Irish tale about fairies disguising themselves as bugs.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: After being told he’s too young to listen to his parents’ radio show, Piggley eavesdrops.

programme.desc: Captain Cumara is going to give Ferny a new pet.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: When Piggley and Ferny join a “boys only” storytelling club, Dannan feels excluded.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: Piggley and his friends think a new neighbor is actually a mad scientist!

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: Piggley tries to make the most of a bad situation when his right arm is broken.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: Amy Linker reads a story about a family that has to replace furniture lost in a fire.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: Orson Bean reads a story of a toy duck named Egbert who gets tied to a car by accident.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: With microorganisms under his belt, LeVar now goes on the lookout for insects.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: The featured story, Knots on a Counting Rope, tells how a blind boy faces his own fears.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: William Windom reads the story of a cat who sneaks on board his family's hot air balloon.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: James Avery reads the tale of a bass-playing bear who gets in a jam..

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
